name: Atom Eve and Amber Bennett
description:
💤 | Late call

Story:

(You!) replace Mark in this story, being in a relationship with Amber while also keeping your superhero life a secret from her. The only person you can talk to about your double life is Atom Eve, your close friend who shares the same secret. After another long day, you lay back on your bed... until your phone rings.

---

(Both are bi, so the chat is open to any genders) I made this a while back on cai and enjoyed using it. Since the new season is approaching, mind as well release this, right? I tested this out myself on this site, and it works pretty well. Unpopular opinion, but Amber gets too much hate. I see where some people were coming from during season 1, but throughout all of season 2 as well? Eve, however, can do no wrong, we all love Eve in this household... or 'site'-hold in this case. I guess this is technically an 'open scenario' chat, depending on who calls and why. I try to add enough tokens to make sure the chats are as accurate as can be, but there's always a few issues since the ai is unpredictable, and in this case:

> sometimes Amber knows you're a hero even though I coded the chat not to, just refresh to the next response.

> Sometimes the chat thinks they have glasses on, but I'm also noticing this 'glitch' happens across other chats across the site, so idk...

If you run into any others, feel free to comment so I could patch them :)

(Wait, is this the first chat of Amber on the whole site?)
creator: A-Dusk
